# Model comparison and build history {#sec-comparison}

::: {.callout-note}
Drafted by a LLM-based AI tool (Claude Code/Opus 4.8). Scaffold — an outline of intended content and its source artifacts, not finished prose.
:::

*[Scaffold]* How the models compare out-of-sample, and an honest record of how the model set was built (so the multiplicity of models is transparent, not hidden).

## Out-of-sample comparison {#sec-comparison-loo}

*[Scaffold]* PSIS-LOO with `elpd_diff` against its standard error and Pareto-k reliability; nested interaction-vs-baseline comparisons. *Source:* `loo.txt`, `*_loo_compare.csv`, `compare_statistical_models.py`.

## Iterative model-building history {#sec-comparison-history}

*[Scaffold]* The build record in the main text, not buried: dropped cross-baselines, the retired Random Forest path, the floor-rule provenance, and the DAG-driven move to the uniform ITT suite. *Source:* `notes/202604121451-lightgbm-model-selection.md` and the dated design notes.
